scripts.test:rules: npm run firestore:compose && npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:exec --config firebase.security.json --project kyrub-security-test --only firestore "node --test --test-concurrency=1 --import tsx tests/firestore-store-security.test.ts tests/firestore-store-directory.test.ts tests/firestore-operational-dual-write.test.ts tests/firestore-canonical-product-dual-write.test.ts tests/firestore-canonical-cash.test.ts tests/firestore-admin-control-plane.test.ts tests/firestore-admin-directory.test.ts"
scripts.deploy:firestore-security: npm run firestore:compose && npx --yes firebase-tools deploy --only firestore:rules --project kyrub-b8d0e --config firebase.json
scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && node --test --import tsx tests/store-persistence.test.ts tests/public-products.test.ts tests/customer-orders.test.ts tests/customer-tables.test.ts tests/table-operations.test.ts tests/store-security.test.ts tests/canonical-store-data.test.ts tests/store-directory.test.ts tests/operational-dual-write.test.ts tests/canonical-product-dual-write.test.ts tests/canonical-cash.test.ts tests/canonical-cash-rules-contract.test.ts tests/migration-reconciliation.test.ts tests/canonical-read-cutover.test.ts tests/migration-completion-gate.test.ts tests/admin-control-plane.test.ts tests/admin-directory.test.ts tests/store-security-rules-contract.test.ts tests/responsive-product-cards.test.ts tests/legacy-firestore-bootstrap.test.ts tests/runtime-firestore-warnings.test.ts
